news.title: Amazon’s (NASDAQ:AMZN) Q4 CY2025: Beats On Revenue But Stock Drops
news.summary: Related-company context for AMZN via MSFT: Cloud computing and online retail behemoth Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q4 CY2025, with sales up 13.6% year on year to $213.4 billion. The company expects next quarter’s revenue to be around $176 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its GAAP profit of $1.95 per share was in line with analysts’ consensus estimates.

news.title: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights NVIDIA, Broadcom, Walmart and Palladyne AI
news.summary: Related-company context for AMZN via WMT: NVDA anchors Zacks' latest Analyst Blog as AI-driven demand lifts chip leaders while Walmart executes and a micro-cap faces pressure.

news.title: Amazon's big capex forecast: What this analyst will be watching
news.summary: Amazon (AMZN) surprised Wall Street when it revealed its plans to spend $200 billion on capital expenditures in 2026. CFRA Research senior equity research analyst Arun Sundaram shares what he will be keeping an eye on to see if that money is being spent well. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination Overtime.

news.title: Alphabet Stock Is Taking a Hit After Strong Earnings. Don’t Panic.
news.summary: Related-company context for AMZN via GOOGL: Alphabet’s earnings reinforce “our view that the stock should be a core holding in large-cap tech portfolios,’ Canaccord Genuity analyst Maria Ripps wrote.

news.title: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy plans to 'invest aggressively' in AI
news.summary: In its fourth quarter earnings release, Amazon (AMZN) revealed it plans to spend $200 billion on capex in 2026. On the earnings call, Amazon CEO Andy Jassy explains why with AI, the company sees "a very unusual opportunity" and plans to "invest aggressively."

news.title: How Recent AI And Power Moves Are Reshaping The IREN (IREN) Investment Story
news.summary: Related-company context for AMZN via MSFT: IREN’s fair value estimate has been nudged from about US$83.00 to roughly US$84.85, with only a slight move in the discount rate from 8.11% to around 8.05% and revenue growth assumptions held near 73.81%. That small shift reflects how recent Street commentary is weighing a stronger AI and power capacity story, including the Microsoft AI contract and 2 GW buildout plans, against earlier concerns around execution, financing and ambitious 2026 revenue goals. As this tug of war between bullish...

news.title: Reddit Stock Jumps on Earnings. CFO Cites Modest AI Spending.
news.summary: Related-company context for AMZN via META: The social-media company reported better-than-expected fourth-quarter financial results on Thursday.

news.title: E.l.f. Beauty CEO talks 'incredible momentum' since Hailey Bieber deal
news.summary: Related-company context for AMZN via WMT: Cosmetics company e.l.f. Beauty (ELF) is glowing up Thursday morning after releasing strong fiscal third quarter earnings results while raising its full-year guidance. e.l.f. Beauty Chairman and CEO Tarang Amin speaks with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi about the brand's momentum since acquiring Hailey Bieber's skincare line Rhode last year. Amin also comments on the company's product roadmap, its core business growth, and sales inside major retailers like Costco (COST) and Walmart (WMT). To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Opening Bid.

news.title: Alphabet: The Tech Conglomerate To Own
news.summary: Related-company context for AMZN via SHOP: Alphabet Inc. is rated a Strong Buy rating, driven by robust Q4 results and a $400B annual revenue milestone. Learn more about GOOG stock here.

news.title: Amazon.com Inc (NASDAQ:AMZN) Shares Slide on AI Investment Concerns Despite Strong Q4 Growth
news.summary: Amazon's Q4 2025 showed strong cloud and retail growth, but shares fell on a revenue miss and massive $200B AI investment plan, raising near-term profit concerns.
